privacy_boundary: Public repository files and commit metadata only; no raw chat, health, pet-health, credentials, contact data, account identifiers, or unreviewed uploads.

memory_slice.title: Deployment workflow pinning narrows supply-chain drift but does not establish deployment success

records.summary: The Cloudflare deployment workflow replaced four mutable third-party Action tags with reviewed 40-character commit references: checkout, wrangler-action, attest-build-provenance, and upload-artifact.
supersedes: The prior deployment-workflow state in which the four dependencies were referenced by mutable major-version tags
records.falsification_or_review_route: Fetch commit b5f8017bc26aa494fd60edf94e6c5ce3bd913fbf and verify each changed uses entry is an exact 40-character commit reference.

records.summary: Within project reporting, 'deployment workflow pinned' means the named direct Action references are immutable at the inspected commit. It does not mean the workflow ran, passed, deployed a site, used valid credentials, or produced trustworthy runtime evidence.
supersedes: Any shorthand treating immutable deployment workflow references as proof of successful deployment
records.falsification_or_review_route: Reject only if later evidence supplies commit-bound workflow execution, successful checks, deployment identity, and served-content verification.

records.summary: Deployment evidence should report dependency reference state, workflow execution state, workflow conclusion, provider deployment identity, and served-content verification as separate fields; no field may imply another.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Test the field separation against the next deployment proof packet and revise only if an authoritative schema supplies stronger non-overlapping semantics.

records.summary: The inspected commit does not establish that the pinned deployment workflow executed successfully, that Cloudflare credentials were configured, that a deployment URL resolved, or that served content matched the source commit.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Retain a commit-bound successful workflow run, provider-returned deployment identity, resolving public URL, and served-source identity proof.
